description: Convert the standard finned rocket in OpenRocket into a tube-finned configuration by replacing the existing trapezoidal fin set with a tube fin set. The new configuration must have 6 fins, a tube length of 70 mm, an outer diameter of 20 mm, and a thickness of 1.0 mm. Run a flight simulation to analyze the performance difference and save the modified design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/tube_fin_conversion.ork. Write a comparative performance report of at least 200 words to /home/ga/Documents/exports/tube_fin_report.md (or .txt) that mentions both fin types and includes specific flight performance metrics such as apogee, velocity, and stability margin.
